name: Derry Area
description_short: Derry Area School District is a public K-12 educational institution serving 1,815 students across 109 square miles in Pennsylvania, not a consumer finance company.
description_long: Derry Area School District (DASD) is a public K-12 school system located in Pennsylvania that serves approximately 1,815 students with a faculty of 138 teachers across a geographic area spanning 109 square miles. The district operates multiple schools including Derry Area High School and provides comprehensive educational services to the community. This is a government-funded public school district, not a financial services provider. The website content exclusively documents school operations, hiring announcements, academic calendars, athletic programs (30 teams), and administrative notices. There are no financial products, lending services, credit offerings, or consumer finance operations of any kind associated with this organization. The domain dasd.us is the official website for school district communications and enrollment information. DASD is fundamentally a public education institution governed by Pennsylvania state education laws and school board policies. Any categorization of this entity as a financial services provider—particularly as a payday alternative lender—is factually incorrect and based on misidentification. The organization's only financial-adjacent function is standard school district operations like hiring food service workers and processing student enrollment.
services: Free at-home internet access for students
pros: Not-for-profit — typically lower fees and better rates than banks

diagnosis: Derry Area School District has been incorrectly categorized. This is a public K-12 school system, not a consumer finance company. It should be removed from CreditDoc entirely as it provides no lending, credit, or financial services to consumers.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
